pi_items.source: Google Patents, Justia Patents - Full patent title is 'Unlocking a device by performing gestures on an unlock image'
Justia Patents Search, Google Patents, The Lens, Unified Patents - Multiple authoritative patent databases confirm this exact patent number format
Justia Patents Search, Free Patents Online, Unified Patents - Patent is assigned to Apple Inc.
Justia Patents Search, Patent databases confirm Freddy Allen Anzures (full name) as one of six inventors on this patent. Last name is Anzures.
Justia Patents (title explicitly states 'issued October 25, 2011'), Unified Patents, The Lens, Golden - Patent was issued on October 25, 2011

privileged_info_summary: US Patent 8046721 B2, titled 'Unlocking a device by performing gestures on an unlock image,' was issued by the US Patent and Trademark Office on October 25, 2011. The patent is assigned to Apple Inc. One of the inventors is Freddy Allen Anzures (last name: Anzures). This is a real patent covering the iconic 'slide-to-unlock' gesture technology used on Apple devices. The patent describes a device with a touch-sensitive display that can be unlocked via gestures performed on the unlock image.
